ddls:
CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "granularity_time" TEXT /* Temporal granularity of the data (e.g., isoweek) */,
  "granularity_geo" TEXT /* Geographical granularity of the data (e.g., nation, region) */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Code representing the location where the data was collected */,
  "border" INTEGER /* Border ID (if applicable) */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., total, 0-5, 6-10) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex (e.g., total, male, female) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the year */,
  "yrwk" TEXT /* Year-week combination (e.g., 2020-08) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., 2019/2020) */,
  "x" INTEGER /* Count of cases or other metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Number of occurrences (e.g., cases) */,
  "date_of_publishing" TEXT /* Date when the data was published */,
  "disease_code" TEXT /* Code representing the specific disease being tracked */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., hospital, clinic, lab) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., verified, preliminary) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data entry, to track changes over time */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the data entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_border FOREIGN KEY ("border") REFERENCES borders ("border_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_location_code FOREIGN KEY ("location_code") REFERENCES locations ("location_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_code" TEXT /* Unique code representing the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "geographical_level" TEXT /* Geographical level (e.g., nation, region) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country (if applicable) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the location entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the location entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "borders" (
  "border_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each border */,
  "border_name" TEXT /* Name of the border */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the border (e.g., border between two regions) */,
  "border_type" TEXT /* Type of border (e.g., international, regional) */,
  "start_location_code" TEXT /* Code of the starting location of the border */,
  "end_location_code" TEXT /* Code of the ending location of the border */,
  "length_km" REAL /* Length of the border in kilometers */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the border entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the border entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the border entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the border entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("border_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., total, 0-5, 6-10) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex (e.g., total, male, female) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the specified demographic */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Code representing the location where the demographic data is collected */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the demographic entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the demographic entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_location_code FOREIGN KEY ("location_code") REFERENCES locations ("location_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2019/2020) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the season entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the season entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the season entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the season entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the data file entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the data file entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data file entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data file entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the readme file */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the readme file entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the readme file entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the readme file entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the readme file entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the user entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the user entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the access log entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the access log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
